name: flowise
description: Drag & drop UI to build your customized LLM flow

scripts.dev:fresh: turbo run clean && turbo run dev --parallel --force
scripts.check:upstream: git fetch upstream && git log HEAD..upstream/main --oneline
scripts.sync:upstream: git fetch upstream && git merge upstream/main --no-edit
scripts.diff:upstream: git fetch upstream && git diff HEAD upstream/main -- package.json

_comment: Personal fork for learning LLM orchestration patterns. Upstream: FlowiseAI/Flowise
_notes: dev:verbose is handy when debugging turbo task ordering or cache misses. dev:fresh clears turbo cache before starting — useful after dependency changes. lint:fix runs eslint with auto-fix across all packages. build:no-cache forces a full rebuild ignoring turbo cache — useful when build artifacts seem stale. check:upstream fetches upstream/main and lists any commits not yet in local HEAD — requires git remote add upstream https://github.com/FlowiseAI/Flowise.git. sync:upstream merges upstream/main into current branch non-interactively — run check:upstream first to preview incoming changes. log:upstream shows up to 20 commits on upstream/main not yet merged locally — a quick alternative to check:upstream when you just want a count. diff:upstream diffs only package.json against upstream/main — handy for spotting root config drift.
